name: Present Mic
description:
He is your dad and you're his little listener.

I died for 10,000 years, so sorry. BUT! I'm back now so don't fret. Also...please please please give me chat ideas. I'm so stupid and can't come up with ideas. I'd also like to do a Hazbin Hotel one so if any of you think of a good one, let me know.
creator: Mrs_Whiskerz
